title: Prenatal p,p´-DDE exposure and neurodevelopment among children 3.5-5 years of age.
ehr_evidence: The study is a prospective perinatal cohort study using direct data collection (interviews, blood samples, and monitoring) rather than EHR.
summary: A prospective perinatal cohort study in Morelos, Mexico, investigating the association between prenatal DDE exposure and neurodevelopmental outcomes in children aged 3.5–5 years.
key_findings: The study evaluates neurodevelopmental outcomes at 42, 48, 54, and 60 months of age based on prenatal DDE exposure.
captured_features: McCarthy’s Scales of Children’s Abilities scores
population: Children aged 3.5–5 years in Morelos, Mexico
limitations: The provided text is incomplete and does not list specific limitations.
